NTALS OF ASTROLOGY
Vedic Seers have sung in ecstasy "Fp 'JncRT '
— The Sun is the Soul of all that is moving and stationary in
the universe.
I am happy to acknowledge the appreciation of the scholars
who have recognized the value of this work as a worthy intro-
duction to the science of astrology. I am now offering a
revised and enlarged edition of the Fundamentals of Astrology.
In this new edition some new elements have been introduced
in order to make the work more useful to the students of
Astrology : A more scientific method of calculating the
Candra-Kriyas, Candravaslhds and Candravclas, a chapter
describing in detail the decanates, their forms, character,
usefulness etc.
Amrtaghafls (nectareous periods), periods of risk in the case
of birth in the Gandunta constellations, effects of conjunction of
five and six planets, a detailed account of the significations of the
12 houses or Bhavas, effects of planets' occupying the twelve
